cards.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE (synced_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE synced_at >= now() - interval '7 days'

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE (published_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date

SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE published_at >= now() - interval '7 days'

SELECT ROUND(AVG(price_usd)::numeric, 0) AS avg_usd
FROM leads_client
WHERE price_usd IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND(AVG(price_gel)::numeric, 0) AS avg_gel
FROM leads_client
WHERE price_gel IS NOT NULL

SELECT (synced_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date AS day,
       COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE synced_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT (published_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tbilisi')::date AS day,
       COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
WHERE published_at IS NOT NULL
  AND published_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT status,
       COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
FROM leads_client
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY CASE status
           WHEN 'new' THEN 1
           WHEN 'contacted' THEN 2
           WHEN 'qualified' THEN 3
           WHEN 'converted' THEN 4
           WHEN 'rejected' THEN 5
           ELSE 99
         END

SELECT
  external_id AS "ID",
  address AS "Адрес",
  district_name AS "Район",
  urban_name AS "Микрорайон",
  phone AS "Телефон",
  price_usd AS "Цена USD",
  price_gel AS "Цена GEL",
  area_m2 AS "Площадь (м²)",
  rooms AS "Комнаты",
  owner_name AS "Владелец",
  floor || '/' || total_floors AS "Этаж",
  comment AS "Состояние",
  'https://myhome.ge/pr/' || external_id AS "Ссылка"
FROM leads_client
ORDER BY synced_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20
